source_message: Oracle E2: marginal B long, Continuation (Trend), bias bullish aligned (overnight bull +448 swept AS.H/NYAM.H/PDH; HTF bull via 4H/1H bear FVGs inverted up; NY-open bull BoS 10:25). Entry ~30452.75 (CE of the dip-reclaim bull FVG 30448.25-30457.25, formed 09:45, took-liq ds 0.82; long the 1m reclaim ~09:46). Stop 30400 (below the 30402.5 dip low). TP1 30615 (NYAM.H, ~3.1R, filled, ran to 30646); TP2 = trail. B not A+: marginal entry (-34pt drawdown, entry FVG invalidated mid-trade, choppy window, weak internal-tier breaks).
